mapper.select: SELECT id, name , mno_logo , manager , GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(manager) as managerNm , use_yn , create_date , create_id , GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(create_id) as createNm FROM tb_pmb_internet_mno WHERE use_yn = 'Y' order by order_no
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_pmb_internet_mno WHERE use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT id, name , mno_logo , manager , GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(manager) as managerNm , use_yn , create_date , create_id , GET_ADMIN_USER_NM(create_id) as createNm FROM tb_pmb_internet_mno WHERE new_ui_use_yn = 'Y' AND new_use_yn = 'Y' order by order_no
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_pmb_internet_mno WHERE new_ui_use_yn = 'Y' AND new_use_yn = 'Y'
